jurisdiction: Karnataka — Bengaluru-calibrated statewide legacy block (BBMP/BDA, now Greater Bengaluru Authority GBA)
regime: BBMP RMP-2015 (as amended Nov-2025) — legacy state-level rules

setbacks.note: Restated 1:1 from fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA.setbacks (maxPlotAreaSqm 150). The Nov-2025 RMP amendment's small-plot relief (0.9 front / 0.7 rear / 0.7 one side, second side may be nil, plots <= 150 m2) is NOT in the legacy block and therefore not modeled.

Restated 1:1 from fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA.setbacks (maxPlotAreaSqm 300). RMP-2015 actually fixes setbacks as percentages of site dimensions for buildings up to 11.5 m (front ~12% of depth, rear/side ~8%) - the legacy fixed ladder is a working simplification.
Restated 1:1 from fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA.setbacks (maxPlotAreaSqm null / open band).

heightByRoad.note: Single full-range band by design: the legacy code_rules.json KA block has no road-width granularity - maxHeightM 12 is its flat cap. (RMP-2015 practice ties taller permissions to road width; not modeled in this adapter.)

far.note: From fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA.FAR. Zone-specific FAR under RMP-2015 (and post-Nov-2025 values) can differ; 1.75 is the calibrated working default.

parking.note: From fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA.parkingPerDwelling: one car space (min ~2.5 x 5.0 m) per dwelling unit, mandatory for dwellings above ~50 m2 built-up; two-wheeler space ~2.5 m2.

rwh.note: Not modeled in the legacy code_rules.json KA block, so this adapter asserts nothing. (Separately, BWSSB mandates rainwater harvesting for Bengaluru sites - commonly cited at >= 1200 sq ft (~111 m2) for new buildings - outside this adapter's scope.)

cornerPlot.note: Corner treatment is not modeled in the legacy code_rules.json KA block; this adapter therefore applies no second-front rule.

roomMinimums.note: NBC-derived room minimums come from fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA (habitable 9.5 m2 / 2.4 m, kitchen 5.0 m2, ceiling 2.75 m, ventilation ratio 0.1, stair 1.0 m).

docChecklist: Sanctioned layout plan / release order (BDA/BBMP/GBA approved layout)
Building plans signed by a registered architect/engineer
Structural stability certificate, as applicable to the proposed height
notes: Adapter pack generated FROM fixtures/code_rules.json states.KA - the numbers above restate that block 1:1 in pack-schema form for the resolver; provenance is the legacy engine block, with docs/region-research.md — KA section as the cited research trail.

Boundary semantics: the legacy engine's maxPlotAreaSqm ladder reads max-INCLUSIVE, while this pack uses half-open [min, max) bands - a plot exactly at 150/300/500 m2 may resolve one band apart between the two systems (the pack picks the larger-plot, stricter band). Treat exact-edge plots as needing manual confirmation.

Known regime drift not modeled (see docs/region-research.md KA setback note): RMP-2015 percentage-based setbacks, the Nov-2025 small-plot relief, zone-specific FAR above 1.75, and 15 m height permissions - two regimes are in circulation in 2026; confirm the sanctioned table with BBMP/GBA.
Advisory defaults for early design only - NOT legal advice and NOT a substitute for a sanctioned plan.
